title: Regions
body: This mods shows the Biome and Village names when walking into their territory ![Displays biome names!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07733c72de8644f0aa35e1485c6de1b470dc3275.png) This project is sponsored by YourKit! YourKit supports open source projects with innovative and intelligent tools for monitoring and profiling Java and .NET applications. YourKit is the creator of YourKit Java Profiler, YourKit .NET Profiler, and YourKit YouMonitor. ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/982d7ca8e9edc5805a394c9f6c6cc3a58f8342fc.png)
